title: Data Analytics Sales Specialists (English)
required_skills: Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience
10 years experience in enterprise software or cloud sales
Experience selling data analytics or data management technologies
bonus_skills: Exceeding business goals in a sales role
Executive relationship management and new territory development
Cross-functional team collaboration to close enterprise agreements
Sales activity planning aligned to data and analytics cycles
matched_skills: Go-to-market strategy support (partial — analytics/marketing context, not sales)
Cross-functional stakeholder management (partial — not in enterprise sales closing context)
C-level data storytelling (partial — reporting context, not sales)
missing_skills: 10 years enterprise software or cloud sales experience (CRITICAL — CV has 0 years direct sales)
Quota-carrying or revenue-closing sales track record
Experience selling data analytics / data management products
Enterprise account development and territory management
Sales cycle planning and pipeline management
core_responsibilities: Grow Google Cloud Data Analytics business by acquiring and expanding customer relationships
Deliver product demos and articulate business value to enterprise clients
Lead cross-functional GTM strategies, sales plays and campaigns
Manage day-to-day relationships as solution sales lead
Provide feedback to product and global solutions teams based on field insights
recommended_emphasis: Go-to-market strategy support experience (IoT/B2B product launches at Intelligent Power Corporation)
C-level stakeholder communication and data storytelling (HSBC PMO role)
Cross-functional team coordination across technical and business stakeholders
Data analytics expertise as a differentiator in client conversations (if pivoting into sales support/overlay role)
role_fit_flag: MISMATCH: This is a quota-carrying enterprise sales role requiring 10 years of cloud/software sales experience. CV profile is a marketing analytics professional (~4-5 years, no direct sales quota ownership). Fundamental role-type mismatch — not recommended for application.

company_info.size_raw: Google — publicly known large enterprise; no explicit headcount in JD; size inferred from company identity
